supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 48 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells and GFAP RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human GFAP primer probe set RTS37485, described in Example 1 above, was used to measure RNA levels. GFAP RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent GFAP RNA levels relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote from Google Patents full text (Examples section present). Primary in-vitro screen (U251/A431) uses quantitative real-time RT-PCR with primer probe set RTS37485 (also RTS38621/RTS38622/RTS38624 in other tables), normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen; results as % of untreated control. SURPRISE: one alternate in-vitro normalization block normalizes GFAP to GAPDH (primer probe set RTS104) and mouse in-vivo studies normalize to cyclophilin A (PPIA), but these are not the basis for the bulk A431/U251 screening data. ACTB not used.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 48 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells and PRNP RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR, using primer probe set RTS42354, as described in Example 1. PRNP RNA levels were normalized using RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below are normalized to PRNP RNA levels in untreated control cells (UTC).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote from Google Patents full text. In-vitro A-431 screen uses quantitative real-time RT-PCR with primer probe sets RTS42354/RTS42356/RTS42359, normalized via RiboGreen; results as % UTC. Mouse in-vivo studies normalize to cyclophilin A (m_cyclo24) but that is not the in-vitro screening basis. ACTB not used.

supporting_quote: Cultured A431 cells at a density of 10,000 cells per well were transfected by free uptake with 4,000 nM antisense oligonucleotide. After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, RNA was isolated from the cells and APOL1 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS35962 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. APOL1 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of APOL1, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote from Google Patents full text. A431 in-vitro screen: quantitative real-time RT-PCR, primer probe set RTS35962 (also RTS35787), APOL1 mRNA adjusted according to total RNA content via RiboGreen; results as % inhibition relative to untreated control. No GAPDH/cyclophilin/ACTB normalization present. ACTB not used.

supporting_quote: IFNAR1 RNA levels were measured by human IFNAR1 primer probe set RTS44352 ... IFNAR1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Verbatim quote from Google Patents full text. A431 in-vitro screen: quantitative real-time RT-PCR, primer probe set RTS44352, normalized to total RNA via RiboGreen; results as % UTC. No housekeeping-gene normalization present. ACTB not used.
